description_long: This bird features a slender body with a long, pointed tail and a slightly curved beak. Its plumage is primarily olive-green with subtle yellowish tones on the underparts and a distinct reddish-orange patch on the head and upper back. The wings and back display a mix of muted green, gray, and blue hues, while the tail is elongated and tapers to a fine point. The beak is short and conical, blending seamlessly with the head's coloration. The legs are not clearly visible, but the overall form suggests a lightweight, agile bird commonly found in urban parks and gardens.
description: A slender, long-tailed bird with olive-green and reddish-orange plumage, featuring a pointed tail and a short, conical beak.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated body, pointed tail, and the reddish-orange patch on the head and upper back.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical tail feathers and the central reddish marking on the upper back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same long tail and olive-green body, with the beak and head profile visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, short beak, and the reddish-orange coloration on the face.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled with patches of solid color and subtle gradients, especially on the head and back
